title: PR 103 · Missing security requirement
description: The PR covers pagination but provides no assessment or artifact for cursor tamper resistance.
request: Add cursor pagination and ensure clients cannot alter cursors to access another account's meals.

requirements.text: The meals API returns and accepts a next cursor.
A cursor cannot be altered or replayed to read another account's meals.

pull_request.title: Paginate meals
pull_request.description: Adds base64 cursors and happy-path tests.

recorded_assessments.rationale: The implementation and test cover basic pagination.
